name: The Boar
setup: A safe village does not mean a safe boar. It has not run and it is not going to, and the distance between you is now its decision rather than yours.
lethalNote: Erik's ruling 2026-07-19: wild animals are lethal — they are. Defeat here is not incapacitation. The stakes dial (SNG-170) governs whether a profile meets them at all, not whether a boar can kill.
